source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 0.6 m diameter household fan takes air in at 98 kPa, 20\circ\text{C} and delivers it at 105 kPa, 21\circ\text{C} with a velocity of 1.5 m/s. What are the mass flow rate (kg/s), the inlet velocity and the outgoing volume flow rate in m^3/s?
